mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inspection t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.inspection_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_inspection WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inspection t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.inspection_type = #{type} ORDER BY t.inspection_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_inspection WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND inspection_type = #{type}
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inspection t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.result = #{result} ORDER BY t.inspection_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_inspection WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND result = #{result}

SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inspection t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND (t.item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.inspector LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.item_code LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY t.inspection_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_inspection WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR inspector LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR item_code LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inspection t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = 0

SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inspection t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.next_date IS NOT NULL AND t.next_date BETWEEN CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND DATEADD(DAY, #{days}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) ORDER BY t.next_date ASC
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inspection t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.result IN ('FAIL', 'DISPOSE') ORDER BY t.inspection_date DESC, t.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_inspection ( inspection_date, item_id, item_name, item_code, inspection_type, inspector, result, next_date, note, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{inspectionDate}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{itemCode}, #{inspectionType}, #{inspector}, #{result}, #{nextDate}, #{note}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_inspection SET inspection_date = #{inspectionDate}, item_id = #{itemId}, item_name = #{itemName}, item_code = #{itemCode}, inspection_type = #{inspectionType}, inspector = #{inspector}, result = #{result}, next_date = #{nextDate}, note = #{note}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_inspection SET is_deleted = 1, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_inspection WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND result IN ('PASS', 'CONDITIONAL')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_inspection WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND result IN ('FAIL', 'DISPOSE')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_inspection WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND next_date IS NOT NULL AND next_date BETWEEN CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND DATEADD(DAY, #{days}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
